issues.detail: The skill does not cover error handling or edge cases such as missing source directories or failed steps.
The setup instructions use brew install, which is not available on Windows, limiting cross-platform compatibility.

scenarios.name: nodejs-ci-pipeline-with-caching-and-secrets
scenarios.rationale: Response A largely satisfies the rubric, while Response B is incomplete and missing key elements.

scenarios.name: convert-github-actions-to-dagger-and-run-locally
scenarios.rationale: Response B includes a TypeScript Dagger pipeline and shows local invocation, but lacks the required GitHub Actions YAML; Response A fails to meet any rubric criteria.
